prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You got this! You are capable of tackling any challenge that comes your way. Just take it one step at a time and don't be afraid to ask for help if you need it. Remember that even if things seem difficult now, success feels so much sweeter when you've worked hard to achieve it. So let's get started, take a deep breath, and give it our all! You've got this!
